summary: Comprehensive testing of collection system fixes, Live Dashboard real-time features, and Analytics cleanup. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with screenshots - all features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Collection system authorization fix verified: pause/resume/stop endpoints now check deployment_managers array instead of requiring the same user who started the collection
Live Dashboard correctly shows date matching selected date (tested with date picker)
Live Dashboard has real-time timer support with active_record data in API response containing start_time, pauses, status
Live Dashboard shows status badges (Active/Paused/Idle) for each kit
Analytics correctly shows 'Collection Records' instead of 'Total Shifts' (renamed)
Analytics does NOT show 'Hours per BnB' section (correctly removed)
Main Dashboard does NOT show 'Request' section (correctly removed)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created temporary collection records for testing Start/Pause/Resume/Stop flow - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Collection system fully working: Start creates new record, Pause/Resume/Stop work correctly. Any deployment manager can control collections on their deployment (not just the user who started it). Live Dashboard shows real-time timers with HH:MM:SS format and status badges (Active/Paused/Idle). Analytics shows Total Deployments and Collection Records metrics, no Hours per BnB. Main Dashboard has 6 cards (Deployments, Live Dashboard, Analytics, Inventory, Hardware, Admin Panel) - no Request section.

Collection system - Resume button works after pause
